description_long: This is a rectangular, low-rise commercial bank building with a modern, minimalist design. The structure features a prominent flat roof with a raised, frosted glass or translucent panel running along the center, likely serving as a skylight or architectural accent. The front facade displays the 'PaninBank' logo in large, bold letters, accompanied by a small icon, set against a clean, light-colored background. The entrance area is recessed and features a series of blue and gray panels, possibly indicating glass doors and windows, with a small step leading up to the entry. The building's exterior is primarily composed of smooth, light-colored materials, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. No visible security features or ATMs are present, and the signage is the most visually distinctive element.
description: A modern, rectangular bank building with a flat roof, frosted glass accent, and prominent 'PaninBank' signage on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'PaninBank' logo, main entrance with blue and gray panels, and a step leading up to the entry.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the flat roof and raised frosted glass panel, with no visible signage or entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted back facade and the full length of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Angled front-side view showing the edge of the 'PaninBank' signage and the building's layered roof structure.
attribute_signage: Large 'PaninBank' text logo with a small icon, located on the upper front facade in red and blue letters.
attribute_entrance_design: Single main entrance with a set of double glass doors, framed by blue and gray panels, and a small step leading up to the entry.
